check-header.name: Authorization
check-header.failed-check-error-message: Authorization header is missing. Please provide a valid Bearer token.

validate-jwt.failed-validation-error-message: Token validation failed. Ensure your token is valid, not expired, and issued by the correct tenant.

set-variable.name: requestBody

return-response.set-body: {"error":"invalid_request","message":"Request body is missing or not valid JSON.","hint":"Provide a JSON body with fields: foundryName, projectId, agentName, message."}
{"error":"missing_field","field":"foundryName","message":"'foundryName' is required and cannot be empty."}
{"error":"missing_field","field":"projectId","message":"'projectId' is required and cannot be empty."}
{"error":"missing_field","field":"agentName","message":"'agentName' is required and cannot be empty."}
{"error":"missing_field","field":"message","message":"'message' is required and cannot be empty."}

set-variable.name: assistantId
